text.title: Perplexity AI Research Workflow Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: One query asks for market_size AND competitors AND trends; answer thin on all three.
antipattern.root-cause: Failed to decompose into atomic sub-queries.
antipattern.fix: Split into ≥3 atomic queries; synthesize after.

antipattern.symptom: Market figures from 2022 presented as 2026 reality; off by 2x.
antipattern.root-cause: search_recency_filter left at default broader window.
antipattern.fix: Set search_recency_filter='year' (or tighter) for time-sensitive facts.

antipattern.symptom: Strategic decision made on a single-source claim rated equal to triangulated ones.
antipattern.root-cause: No H/M/L confidence per claim in the report.
antipattern.fix: Add confidence column; derive from source count + agreement strength.
